title: Invisible HUD
description: Hides all HUD elements, but keeps UI unchanged.
body:
**This resource pack removes all HUD information, use with caution!**
This is a resource pack created specifically for modding. While creating mods, you might want to not have hud info in case you are re-creating some other game or something like that, so I decided to do the work for you. This should work for all of 1.21, but if you use the right version it removes the "made for newer version" text. This pack hides:
- Hearts
- Hunger
- Hotbar backround
- Off-hand background
- Axiom builder tool hotbar background
- Experience bar
This pack does not hide:
- All UI, such as chests, crafting tables, or the inventory.
- Items IN hotbar
